# Proverbs 5

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-INDEX (verse table + nav; auto-generated — safe to regenerate) -->

↑ [Proverbs](../README.md)  ·  [‹ Proverbs 4](../Proverbs-04/README.md)  ·  [Proverbs 6 ›](../Proverbs-06/README.md)

## Verses (23)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | My son, give attention to my wisdom; let your ear be turned to my teaching: | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | So that you may be ruled by a wise purpose, and your lips may keep knowledge. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | For honey is dropping from the lips of the strange woman, and her mouth is smoother than oil; | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | But her end is bitter as wormwood, and sharp as a two-edged sword; | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | Her feet go down to death, and her steps to the underworld; | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | She never keeps her mind on the road of life; her ways are uncertain, she has no knowledge. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | Give ear to me then, my sons, and do not put away my words from you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | Go far away from her, do not come near the door of her house; | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | For fear that you may give your honour to others, and your wealth to strange men: | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | And strange men may be full of your wealth, and the fruit of your work go to the house of others; | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | And you will be full of grief at the end of your life, when your flesh and your body are wasted; | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | And you will say, How was teaching hated by me, and my heart put no value on training; | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | I did not give attention to the voice of my teachers, my ear was not turned to those who were guiding me! | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | I was in almost all evil in the company of the people. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | Let water from your store and not that of others be your drink, and running water from your fountain. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | Let not your springs be flowing in the streets, or your streams of water in the open places. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | Let them be for yourself only, not for other men with you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | Let blessing be on your fountain; have joy in the wife of your early years. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | As a loving hind and a gentle doe, let her breasts ever give you rapture; let your passion at all times be moved by her love. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | Why let yourself, my son, go out of the way with a strange woman, and take another woman in your arms? | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | For a man's ways are before the eyes of the Lord, and he puts all his goings in the scales. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | The evil-doer will be taken in the net of his crimes, and prisoned in the cords of his sin. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | He will come to his end for need of teaching; he is so foolish that he will go wandering from the right way. | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
